name: astroprecise
description: AstroPrecise — static astrology PWA (website/), ephemeris engine + npm package, dormant Android app. See OVERHAUL-PLAN.md.

scripts.test: node test-engine.mjs && node test-engine-solar-lunar.mjs && node test-engine-planets.mjs && node test-engine-houses.mjs && node test-engine-edge.mjs && node test-horoscope.mjs && node test-compat.mjs && node test-content-bank.mjs && node test-art-themes.mjs && npm --prefix ephemeris-package test
scripts.test:engine: node test-engine.mjs && node test-engine-solar-lunar.mjs && node test-engine-planets.mjs && node test-engine-houses.mjs && node test-engine-edge.mjs
